mapper.select: SELECT WORK_EXPER_NO, PERSON_ID, CPNY_NAME, DEPT_NAME, POSITION, DUTY, PAYROLL, RESIGN_REASON, WITNESS, TEL, AGE_LIMIT, WORK_ADDRESS, SENIORITY_RESPONSE, ACTIVITY, NATIONALITY, EN_POSITION_NAME, OLD_ID, PAY_YEAR, APPLY_TYPE, UPDATE_WORK_EXPER_NO, ESS_TYPE_CODE, REMARK, OVERSEAS, CALLBACK, EARROR, END_MONTH, START_MONTH, START_DATE, END_DATE, ORDERNO FROM HR_WORK_EXPERIENCE_APPLY WHERE WORK_EXPER_NO = #{workExperNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
